Description:
Grants a 40% chance that after casting <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, your next <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> will require no MP and have no cast time.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>30s

Grants a 40% chance that after casting <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, your next <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire III<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> will require no MP and have no cast time.

Grants an <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Heart<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> upon casting <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Freeze<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, or executing <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Manafont<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Umbral Soul<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Grants stacks of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Heart<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> upon casting <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Freeze<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, or executing <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Manafont<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> or <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Umbral Soul<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Casting of certain fire and ice spells will grant a stack of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> respectively.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Maximum Stacks: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>1
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>15s
While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, the potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is increased by 40%, the cost of casting <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is doubled, MP recovery is reduced to 0, and the potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is reduced by 10%.
While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, the cost of casting <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is reduced to 0, 2,500 MP is recovered upon landing an <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spell, and the potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is reduced by 10%.

Casting of certain fire and ice spells will grant a stack of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> and <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Umbral Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> respectively.

While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Astral Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, the potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is increased by 40%, the cost of casting <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Fire<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is doubled, MP recovery is reduced to 0, and the potency of <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Ice<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> spells is reduced by 10%.
